events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the wrong gasket material/type was installed before the required material-verification hold point was completed — a sequence violation under ASME PCC-1/B16.5. Decision is `fail` (high risk); work must stop, the gasket must be pulled and replaced with the correct material verified against the line class/service spec, then re-torqued per PCC-1's star-pattern sequence with QC sign-off before hydrotest.
